data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Permission scope enforcement (can't read outside grant)', but the evidence does not confirm that this behavior is being enforced. The linked use case discusses event handling but does not provide concrete evidence of permission enforcement in the context of the persona scenario. Specifically, there is no evidence of the expected behavior being tested or confirmed, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of permission scope enforcement being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify permission scope enforcement.
